notes: SHIP 3 — Retire EDP-as-Architect (Master Pivot COMPLETE). The EDP paste→create path is deleted; Master-scope is now the ONLY way to create a deployment, and the EDP parser survives only as the AUDITOR (vendor cross-check) + the BOM analyzer's engine. (1) ENTRY POINTS REWIRED: deploy_showList drops the ＋ EDP / ＋ INTAKE buttons and the empty-state 'Paste EDP (advanced)'; deploy_showCommandCenter's ＋ NEW, the nav_restore 'ingest' token, and the blocker/handoff 'OPEN INTAKE' empty-states now route to mscope_open; the 'Revise Manifest' (EDP re-paste) button is removed. (2) ~1790 LINES EXCISED across 8 architect subsystems: the deploy_showIngest paste form + analyze entry chain (deploy_analyze / _deploy_analyze_postGate / deploy_forceAnalyze), deploy_runAnalysis + deploy_create (the create-via-analysis), the EDP Hash Gate (edpGate_*) + Intake Gate (intakeGate_*) and their full-screen overlays, the revGate EDP-revision subsystem + overlay, and the INTAKE file-drop subsystem + sheet. (3) KEPT (shared infra — the spec under-described this): deploy_parseEDP_local and its helpers (deploy_classifyDevice/inferDeviceRole/inferOptic/extractGpuType/parseCSVLine), AND phantomEDP_parse + its cache (deploy_getCachedParse/setCachedParse) + deploy_preprocessEDP — because the BOM ANALYZER (bom-analyze-btn → phantomEDP_parse) uses the same parse engine. So deploy_parseEDP_local now has two legitimate callers: vendorEdp_attach (Ship 2B auditor) and phantomEDP_parse (BOM). _deploy_create_postIntake / deploy_seedRacksAndPhases / deploy_hash stay (Master-scope create path). The Manifest tab stays; only its revGate revision affordance was removed. (4) edpParsed: deliberately UNCHANGED — on a Master-scoped deployment it stores the FROZEN snapshot (read by the seeder, vendor cross-check, PRE-FLIGHT); the spec's 'delete edpParsed writes' clause was rejected because it would have broken the pivot. (5) BACKWARD-COMPAT: deploy_showDetail shows a one-line 'older method — read-only' banner for any legacy deployment that has edpParsed but is not Master-scoped (dep.scope.source!=='master'). FINAL STATE: one source (Master), one job (scope), one working copy (snapshot), one audit (Reconcile). VERIFIED: node-checked (2 inline scripts + sw.js), braces balanced; assertion-guarded splice (verified every keep-boundary incl. the shared parser helpers + _deploy_create_postIntake); dangling-reference sweep (zero surviving calls — the BOM phantomEDP_parse caller was caught and the parser preserved); browser end-to-end (Master-only create path; vendor attach still cross-checks; BOM analyzer still parses; old-EDP banner). POST-REVIEW (4-lens deletion audit) — fixed two real bugs the deletion introduced: (i) restored the lost 'var _deployIngestResults = null;' declaration (it lived in the deleted ingest block; deploy_aiReview reads it bare and would have ReferenceError'd on a fresh session — node --check can't catch an undeclared read); (ii) re-pointed deploy_renderIngestError (still reached by the KEPT Master-scope deploy_validateStorageHeadroom) from the deleted #deploy-results panel to phantomToast, so a storage-full create surfaces instead of failing silently; plus removed the orphaned _revGate_state var and the two now-uncalled validators (deploy_preflightCheck / deploy_validateRackCap). DEFERRED (inert, non-blocking): orphaned .eh-/.ei-/.rd-/.intake-sheet CSS and a few stale comments mentioning deleted symbols — flagged for a later cosmetic sweep. Built in Claude Code on a404fca (v1.6.90); web-Claude does post-merge parity review (one-builder rule). Three stamps at v1.6.91.
